## Validazione
- [ ] `python manage.py check`
- [ ] `python manage.py test polls` (se tocca polls)
- [ ] `python manage.py check --deploy` (se tocca settings/deploy)

## Branch suggerito
- `fix/<slug-issue>` oppure `feature/<slug-issue>` oppure `chore/<slug-issue>`
